arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Arsenal-Shakhtar Donetsk, Real Madrid-Dortmund
arts.sum: The latest updates and analysis from matchday three of the 2024-25 Champions League season, with Arsenal hosting Shakhtar Donetsk and Real Madrid facing Borussia Dortmund

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed unexpected William Saliba red card update with Man City and Liverpool twist
arts.sum: Before that huge title showdown, the Gunners face Shakhtar Donetsk in Champions League action at Emirates Stadium with Saliba available. Arsenal will have to navigate this weekend's Premier League clash against Liverpool without defender William Saliba.

arts.ttl: 20 Clubs With Most Premier League Red Cards since Arteta Joined Arsenal
arts.sum: Arsenal are among the most frequent offenders when it comes to receiving red cards in the Premier League since Mikel Arteta's arrival.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Zinchenko makes shock Man City allegation
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has claimed that Manchester City kept him on an academy deal until he had made 43 senior appearances for the club. "The City lawyers said: 'Look, this is an academy player contract, right?

arts.ttl: VAR's next step to continue key improvement despite Liverpool and Arsenal decisions
arts.sum: VAR has remained a source of controversy this season in the Premier League but PGMOL suggest changes implemented have seen an improvement in using technology for 2024/25

arts.ttl: Premier League make massive referee decision after Arsenal William Saliba VAR red card controversy
arts.sum: Assisted by Jarred Gillett on VAR for the Arsenal trip to Bournemouth, J ones eventually awarded a red card to Saliba after he was judged to have denied a goalscoring opportunity for Evanilson. Rob Jones, the referee who initially gave William Saliba a yellow card against Bournemouth, has been assigned only to fourth official duty for the next Premier League matchday.

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Shakhtar Donetsk on TV for free in tonight's Champions League
arts.sum: Arsenal vs Shakhtar is the latest Champions League match to be shown live on Amazon Prime Video

arts.ttl: Liverpool dealt Diogo Jota injury blow as five players miss training before Arsenal
arts.sum: Arne Slot, whose side face Arsenal at the Emirates on Sunday, had expressed concerns about Trent Alexander-Arnold and Alexis Mac Allister after the Chelsea clash, but both were present at training . Liverpool could be without Diogo Jota for their Champions League clash against RB Leipzig, with the 27-year-old forward absent from training on Tuesday afternoon .

arts.ttl: Arsenal interested in clever transfer that could save millions with January agreement
arts.sum: Arsenal are one of two Premier League clubs who are reportedly showing an interest in young Aston Villa goalkeeper Oliwier Zych. Zych has been included in Villa’s first-team matchday squad on three occasions so far this season, including in the Champions League clash against Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed title boost as Man City given concerning double injury update
arts.sum: "It's not a big issue but he doesn't feel completely fine and Kevin is not 22 years old anymore," he said, via the Manchester Evening News . Pep Guardiola is still uncertain about when Kevin De Bruyne will make his return for Arsenal title rivals Manchester City, five weeks after sustaining what was initially described as a minor injury.
